consistency.attunement_status: Consistent ('requires_attunement': true and indicated in description via '[attunement]').

quality.description_clarity: The description is clear and details the activation, duration, limitations (10 minutes, remove armor, command word again), and recharge time (next dawn).
quality.formatting_notes: The description includes markdown referencing '#section-attunement', which is typical for source documentation but standard for item descriptions.

mechanics.core_effect: Grants the effect of the *etherealness* spell upon speaking a command word.
mechanics.interruptions: Effect ends if armor is removed or command word is spoken again (as an action).

analysis.data_integrity: All fields are present and correctly formatted based on the provided RAW DATA structure. No ZOD errors were reported.
